zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Elizabeth Hill於1500年7月5日出生在英國史洛普爾霍德特時，她的父親Edward Bestney II23歲，母親Eleanor Spendlove22歲。她於1517年與William Barker結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年1月29日在英國素福爾可易普斯維其享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Elizabeth Hill于1500年7月5日出生在英国史洛普爾霍德特时，她的父亲Edward Bestney II23岁，母亲Eleanor Spendlove22岁。她于1517年与William Barker结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年1月29日在英国素福爾可易普斯維其享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Elizabeth Hill was born on 5 July 1500, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, her father, Edward Bestney II, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor Spendlove, was 22. She married William Barker in 1517. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 29 January 1540, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Elizabeth Hill est née le 5 juillet 1500, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Bestney II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Spendlove, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Barker en 1517. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 janvier 1540, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Elizabeth Hill am 5. Juli 1500 in Hodnet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Bestney II 23 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Spendlove 22. Sie hat 1517 William Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Januar 1540 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Elizabeth Hill è nata il il 5 luglio 1500 nel Hodnet, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Edward Bestney II, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Spendlove, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Barker nel 1517. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 29 gennaio 1540, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Elizabeth Hillが1500年7月5日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで生まれた時，父Edward Bestney IIは23歳，母Eleanor Spendloveは22歳であった。1517年にWilliam Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年1月29日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Elizabeth Hill(이)가 1500년 7월 5일 영국 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Bestney II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Spendlove(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1517년 William Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 1월 29일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.5 July 1500–29 January 1540: 5 de julho de 1500–29 de janeiro de 1540
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Elizabeth Hill nasceu em 5 de julho de 1500, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Bestney II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Spendlove, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Barker em 1517. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1540, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Elizabeth Hill родилась 5 июля 1500 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Bestney II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Spendlove, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Barker в 1517 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 29 января 1540 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.5 July 1500–29 January 1540: 5 de julio de 1500–29 de enero de 1540
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Elizabeth Hill nació el 5 de julio de 1500, en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Bestney II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eleanor Spendlove, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Barker en 1517. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 29 de enero de 1540, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
